scripts.deploy:dashboard: npm run dashboard:prepare && wrangler pages deploy .dashboard-dist --project-name=page-speed-tester-dashboard
scripts.dev:dashboard: npm run dashboard:prepare && wrangler pages dev .dashboard-dist
scripts.db:migrate: npm run wrangler:generate && wrangler d1 execute page-speed-db --local --file=schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npm run wrangler:generate && wrangler d1 execute page-speed-db --remote --file=schema.sql
